mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password, username, role, account_status, enabled, verification_token_hash, verification_token_expire_time, verified, password_reset_token_hash, password_reset_token_expire_time, session_revoked_before, failed_login_attempts, deleted, creation_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{username}, #{role}, #{accountStatus}, #{enabled}, #{verificationTokenHash}, #{verificationTokenExpireTime}, #{verified}, #{passwordResetTokenHash}, #{passwordResetTokenExpireTime}, #{sessionRevokedBefore}, #{failedLoginAttempts}, #{deleted}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{username})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{username}) AND id != #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM users WHERE verification_token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM users WHERE password_reset_token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = FALSE AND enabled = TRUE AND verified = TRUE AND account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND id != #{excludeUserId} AND LOWER(username) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{query}) THEN 0 WHEN LOWER(username) LIKE CONCAT(LOWER(#{query}), '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, username ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, username = #{username}, verified = #{verified}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, verification_token_hash = #{verificationTokenHash}, verification_token_expire_time = #{verificationTokenExpireTime}, password_reset_token_hash = #{passwordResetTokenHash}, password_reset_token_expire_time = #{passwordResetTokenExpireTime}, session_revoked_before = #{sessionRevokedBefore}, failed_login_attempts = #{failedLoginAttempts}, lockout_time = #{lockoutTime}, enabled = #{enabled}, deleted = #{deleted}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE users SET deleted = TRUE, enabled = FALSE, account_status = 'DELETED', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
